one_lever: Specialize BatchTrace unbatched-operand rank-1 overwrite scatter to write the batched output directly.

baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_scatter/batched_indices_updates --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

candidate.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_scatter/batched_indices_updates --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

behavior_proof.ordering: Overwrite mode still iterates row-major through indices; duplicate indices keep the last update within each batch.
behavior_proof.tie_breaking: No comparator or branch-priority tie-breaker changed.
behavior_proof.floating_point: The kept fast path only rewrites overwrite assignment and does not perform floating-point arithmetic.
behavior_proof.rng: No RNG state or random primitive is read or written.

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-dispatch scatter -- --nocapture
validation.notes: 4 scatter-filtered lib tests and 3 scatter-filtered dispatch_p2c004 integration tests passed.
Existing fj-ad unused-variable warning remained advisory.

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets -- -D warnings
validation.notes: Blocked before fj-dispatch by existing crates/fj-ad/src/lib.rs:6479 unused variable, tracked as frankenjax-ch8e.

rejected_alternatives: Generic scatter add-mode specialization: rejected for pass 1 because add requires dtype-specific arithmetic and the current benchmark is overwrite-only.
Shape-general slice specialization: rejected for pass 1 to keep the lever narrow and prove rank-1 scalar-update semantics first.
